---
title: "Lecture 8: Data Structures, Base R"
date: 2025-07-22
summary: "Intro to Data Structures and Base R"
url_slides: 08-slides.qmd
url_code: csp-materials/base-r
page-layout: full
draft: false
---

**Summary**: {< meta summary >}

**Code**: Copy and run in your console: `usethis::use_course("{< meta url_code >}")`

## Topics

## Before Class

## Readings
